title: chargeback — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. `BelongsToChargeback` is the FK trait for downstream models (ChargebackEvidence + future marketing-event rows tied to a specific chargeback). `HasChargebackEvidence` is the inverse-side convenience on the parent Chargeback model. Order matters when composed with `BelongsToTenant`: tenant MUST come first so subsequent traits observe the tenant context.

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries a `chargeback_id` FK. Adds the `chargeback()` belongsTo relation and refuses cross-tenant writes at save time. Applied to ChargebackEvidence directly + planned growth::marketing::MarketingEvent (Wave 5) that carries chargeback_id for negative-value + fraud signal attribution.
usedBy: growth::marketing::MarketingEvent (Wave 5 — marketing events fired on ChargebackLost carry chargeback_id for negative-value + fraud signal attribution)

owned.description: Composed onto the Chargeback model. Adds `->evidence()` (hasMany), `->latestEvidence()` (has max submission_attempt_number), `->evidenceCount()` (count of submission attempts). Convenience: `$chargeback->has_submitted_evidence` for the boolean.

framework.reason: Chargeback model only — ChargebackEvidence is NOT soft-deletable (immutable append-only audit). Retention pipeline handles hard-delete of chargebacks post 7y.

tenants.reason: Every owned row carries tenant_id per tenancy-columns.md §3.

audit.reason: Every write is compliance-relevant (financial-record + card network audit 7-year retention). Every state transition on Chargeback (status, evidence_submitted_at, decision_at, credit_note_id, transaction_id, fee_transaction_id, refund_id) + every ChargebackEvidence creation is audit-critical.

activity.reason: Chargeback lifecycle transitions (filed / evidence_submitted / under_review / won / lost / expired / accepted_refund) feed the staff-visible activity feed. NOT on ChargebackEvidence (immutable append-only row — already covered by parent chargeback activity log).

encryption.reason: Applied on Chargeback for provider_reference_id + provider_metadata (encrypted at rest). Applied on ChargebackEvidence for provider_response (encrypted at rest). NOT on the whole row — column-level encryption via cast.

chargeback.notes: Order: BelongsToTenant first. HasChargebackEvidence is the inverse-side convenience. SoftDeletes permits marking a chargeback as deleted while retaining the audit trail through the retention window. SoftDeletes ONLY functional pre-terminal — Post-terminal chargebacks are immutable + retention-pipeline-managed.

chargeback_evidence.notes: NO SoftDeletes — ChargebackEvidence is 7y-retained HARD as an append-only audit row. NO HasActivityLog — already covered by parent Chargeback activity log. Auditable is required for the 7-year financial + card network audit trail. NO Searchable — evidence lookup is always by (chargeback_id, submission_attempt_number), never full-text search.
